notes: Shopify store (Cloudflare-fronted, Southern California distributor; authorized for Kerr, Woodpecker, Eighteeth, etc., plus its own 'JMU DENTAL' house brand). Config-driven Shopify routing (adapters/shopify-config.ts): matched by origin host jmudental.com OR distributor alias, then extracted via the shared /products.json catalog path (shopify-catalog-extraction.ts) with the per-page HTML adapter (adapters/shopify.ts) as the fallback tier. variant.sku -> supplier SKU, product.vendor -> brand, variant.price (dollars string) -> price, variant.available -> stock. Catalog ~645 products across 3 pages of /products.json?limit=250&page=N (250 + 250 + 145; page 4 empty). Cloudflare present but a normal browser UA gets 200 JSON with full pricing logged-out; throttle paging (~1 req/s) to avoid tripping a CF challenge (same caution as Davis). Shopify strips variant.barcode from the public list /products.json, so expect no GTIN/UPC (no lot/expiry barcode hook), same limitation as our other Shopify-sourced suppliers. Net32 winning seller (377 wins). Verified live 2026-07-01 (read-only): homepage 200 (no /password gate), products.json 200, Eighteeth SurfyOne Sonic Activator (sku 22114008, Eighteeth) = $299.99, JMU Dental Disposable Mouth Exam Mirror 100/Bag (sku 10107006, JMU DENTAL) = $15.99, 0/1250 sampled page-1 variants carried a barcode.
